description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated male figure with a full beard, dressed in a suit and overcoat, positioned on a sturdy rectangular stone pedestal. The man is shown in a relaxed pose, holding a book or document in his left hand while his right hand rests on his thigh. The chair features ornate details, and various objects, including a bag and a bundle of scrolls or papers, are placed at the base near his feet. The surface of the sculpture has a greenish patina, typical of aged bronze, while the pedestal is made of light-colored stone. The front of the pedestal is inscribed with the name 'CHRISTIAN KROHG', indicating the subject of the sculpture.
description: A bronze statue of a seated bearded man in a suit, holding a book, atop a stone pedestal inscribed with 'CHRISTIAN KROHG'. The sculpture features detailed accessories and a green patina.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the seated figure, the chair's ornate design, and objects placed behind the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the man's profile, the book in his hand, and objects at the base of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the man's face, the book, and the inscription 'CHRISTIAN KROHG' on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the arm resting on the chair, and additional objects at the base.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone pedestal, suggesting an outdoor public or urban setting such as a plaza or park.
